# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: <your-app> # replace with your app's shortened version, e.g., mymicroservice
spec:
  replicas:  <replicas_number>  #replace by the desired number of pods for this application  
  selector:   
     matchLabels:      {<matchlabels-yourapp>}        # replace <matchlabelname='value', e.g., app=mymicroservice, version=v1> with your respective labels and values or leave it blank if not required (e.g.:   "app": "myapplication", 
                             }                }, in the case of multiple services share a common label)    #replace by appropriate matchlabels for differentiating between them e.g., app: mymicroservice, version=v1 etc.)     to be specific with what you are trying here (e.g.:   "app": <value> )
  template:     
        metadata:       {  <your-meta-annotations>  # replace your annotations below    }                {"kubernetes.io/metadata.name":"<my-deployment-"><cluster_nodename>>"}     to be specific with the name you want for deployment and cluster node e.g., mymicroservice, k8snode1
        annotation:  {  <sidecarInject:"false">  # This line will disable automatic sidecars injection in istio pod by setting value as false    }                       "istio.io/inject": disabled   }, to be specific with the key and values you want, e.g., name=<your-app> , type of annotations should match your needs
      spec:       {  <specs>  # replace this area by declaring each piece related specification for pod as needed    }              {"sidecar":{"type":"init","args":{}}}, "service" : <services.name> <port_number>>}})  )     to be specific with the services and their port numbers e.g., mymicrosice/5001:8473, kubernetes-nodeports
      containers:       *  <containers> #replace by declaring each container specification here as needed    }   name=<container_name>  imageVersion <imageName> <command><args>>  )     to be specific with the details of your app and its version e.g., "my-app" : v1, , mymicroservice/5002:8473
